revision.comment: restoring |lang1=; it has been sandboxed and works fine
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly><templatestyles src="Verse translation/styles.css" />
{|role="presentation" class="verse_translation {{#if:{{{attr1|}}}:{{{attr2|}}}||wrap_when_small}}" style="margin-left:1em !important"<!--
-->{{#if:{{{head1|}}}{{{head2|}}}|<nowiki/>
{{!}}-
!scope="col"{{!}}{{{head1|}}}
!scope="col"{{!}}{{{head2|}}}
}}
|-style="vertical-align:top"
|{{#tag:poem|{{{1}}}|style="font-style:{{#switch:{{{lang|{{{lang1|}}}}}}||en=roman|#default={{#if:{{{italicsoff|}}}|roman|italic}}}};text-align:{{#if:{{{rtl1|}}}|right|left}}"|lang={{{lang|{{{lang1|}}}}}}}}
|class="translated"|{{#tag:poem|{{{2}}}|style="font-style:{{#switch:{{{lang2|}}}||en=roman|#default={{#if:{{{italicsoff2|}}}|roman|italic}}}};text-align:{{#if:{{{rtl2|}}}|right|left}}"|lang={{{lang2|}}}}}<!--
-->{{#if:{{{attr1|}}}{{{attr2|}}}|<nowiki/>
{{!}}-style="vertical-align:top;font-size:90%"
{{!}}style="padding-{{#if:{{{rtl1|}}}|right|left}}:1.6em;text-align:{{#if:{{{rtl1|}}}|right|left}}"{{!}}{{#if:{{{attr1|}}}|—{{{attr1|}}}|}}
{{!}}style="padding-{{#if:{{{rtl2|}}}|right|left}}:3.6em;text-align:{{#if:{{{rtl2|}}}|right|left}}"{{!}}{{#if:{{{attr2|}}}|—{{{attr2|}}}|}}
}}
|}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23692667944|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly><templatestyles src="Verse translation/styles.css" />
{|role="presentation" class="verse_translation {{#if:{{{attr1|}}}:{{{attr2|}}}||wrap_when_small}}" style="margin-left:1em !important"<!--
-->{{#if:{{{head1|}}}{{{head2|}}}|<nowiki/>
{{!}}-
!scope="col"{{!}}{{{head1|}}}
!scope="col"{{!}}{{{head2|}}}
}}
|-style="vertical-align:top"
|{{#tag:poem|{{{1}}}|style="font-style:{{#switch:{{{lang|{{{lang1|}}}}}}||en=roman|#default={{#if:{{{italicsoff|}}}|roman|italic}}}};text-align:{{#if:{{{rtl1|}}}|right|left}}"|lang={{{lang|{{{lang1|}}}}}}}}
|class="translated"|{{#tag:poem|{{{2}}}|style="font-style:{{#switch:{{{lang2|}}}||en=roman|#default={{#if:{{{italicsoff2|}}}|roman|italic}}}};text-align:{{#if:{{{rtl2|}}}|right|left}}"|lang={{{lang2|}}}}}<!--
-->{{#if:{{{attr1|}}}{{{attr2|}}}|<nowiki/>
{{!}}-style="vertical-align:top;font-size:90%"
{{!}}style="padding-{{#if:{{{rtl1|}}}|right|left}}:1.6em;text-align:{{#if:{{{rtl1|}}}|right|left}}"{{!}}{{#if:{{{attr1|}}}|—{{{attr1|}}}|}}
{{!}}style="padding-{{#if:{{{rtl2|}}}|right|left}}:3.6em;text-align:{{#if:{{{rtl2|}}}|right|left}}"{{!}}{{#if:{{{attr2|}}}|—{{{attr2|}}}|}}
}}
|}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

<includeonly><templatestyles src="Verse translation/styles.css" />
{|role="presentation" class="verse_translation {{#if:{{{attr1|}}}:{{{attr2|}}}||wrap_when_small}}" style="margin-left:1em !important"<!--
-->{{#if:{{{head1|}}}{{{head2|}}}|<nowiki/>
{{!}}-
!scope="col"{{!}}{{{head1|}}}
!scope="col"{{!}}{{{head2|}}}
}}
|-style="vertical-align:top"
|{{#tag:poem|{{{1}}}|style="font-style:{{#switch:{{{lang|{{{lang1|}}}}}}||en=roman|#default={{#if:{{{italicsoff|}}}|roman|italic}}}};text-align:{{#if:{{{rtl1|}}}|right|left}}"|lang={{{lang|{{{lang1|}}}}}}}}
|class="translated"|{{#tag:poem|{{{2}}}|style="font-style:{{#switch:{{{lang2|}}}||en=roman|#default={{#if:{{{italicsoff2|}}}|roman|italic}}}};text-align:{{#if:{{{rtl2|}}}|right|left}}"|lang={{{lang2|}}}}}<!--
-->{{#if:{{{attr1|}}}{{{attr2|}}}|<nowiki/>
{{!}}-style="vertical-align:top;font-size:90%"
{{!}}style="padding-{{#if:{{{rtl1|}}}|right|left}}:1.6em;text-align:{{#if:{{{rtl1|}}}|right|left}}"{{!}}{{#if:{{{attr1|}}}|—{{{attr1|}}}|}}
{{!}}style="padding-{{#if:{{{rtl2|}}}|right|left}}:3.6em;text-align:{{#if:{{{rtl2|}}}|right|left}}"{{!}}{{#if:{{{attr2|}}}|—{{{attr2|}}}|}}
}}
|}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly><templatestyles src="Verse translation/styles.css" />
{|role="presentation" class="verse_translation {{#if:{{{attr1|}}}:{{{attr2|}}}||wrap_when_small}}" style="margin-left:1em !important"{{#if:{{{head1|}}}{{{head2|}}}|<nowiki/>
{{!}}-
!scope="col"{{!}}{{{head1|}}}
!scope="col"{{!}}{{{head2|}}}
}}
|-style="vertical-align:top"
|{{#tag:poem|{{{1}}}|style="font-style:{{#switch:{{{lang|{{{lang1|}}}}}}||en=roman|#default={{#if:{{{italicsoff|}}}|roman|italic}}}};text-align:{{#if:{{{rtl1|}}}|right|left}}"|lang={{{lang|{{{lang1|}}}}}}}}
|class="translated"|{{#tag:poem|{{{2}}}|style="font-style:{{#switch:{{{lang2|}}}||en=roman|#default={{#if:{{{italicsoff2|}}}|roman|italic}}}};text-align:{{#if:{{{rtl2|}}}|right|left}}"|lang={{{lang2|}}}}}{{#if:{{{attr1|}}}{{{attr2|}}}|<nowiki/>
{{!}}-style="vertical-align:top;font-size:90%"
{{!}}style="padding-{{#if:{{{rtl1|}}}|right|left}}:1.6em;text-align:{{#if:{{{rtl1|}}}|right|left}}"{{!}}{{#if:{{{attr1|}}}|—{{{attr1|}}}|}}
{{!}}style="padding-{{#if:{{{rtl2|}}}|right|left}}:3.6em;text-align:{{#if:{{{rtl2|}}}|right|left}}"{{!}}{{#if:{{{attr2|}}}|—{{{attr2|}}}|}}
}}
|}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
